title: citharexylum fruticosum f. subvillosum
intro: Citharexylum fruticosum f. subvillosum, also known as the tree with a thousand flowers or the thorny tree, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Citharexylum fruticosum f. subvillosum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
